Class SBrickProtocolConstants

java.lang.Object
ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
public final class SBrickProtocolConstants extends Object
Constants for the SBrick BLE remote control protocol (Rev. 26, 2020-10-28).

Reference: SBrick BLE Protocol PDF, Vengit Limited.

Note on the Remote Control Commands UUID: the official PDF omits a leading zero. The correct UUID is REMOTE_CONTROL_COMMANDS_UUID.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    AD_RECORD_DEVICE_IDENTIFIER
    Ad record type: device identifier (6-byte string).
    static final int
    AD_RECORD_PRODUCT_INFO
    Ad record type: product ID, HW major/minor, FW major/minor.
    static final int
    AD_RECORD_SECURITY_STATUS
    Ad record type: security status.
    static final int
    AD_RECORD_THERMAL_PROTECTION
    Ad record type: thermal protection status.
    static final int
    AD_RECORD_VOLTAGE
    Ad record type: voltage measurement (12-bit ADC + 4-bit channel).
    static final int
    ADC_CHANNEL_BATTERY
    ADC channel: battery voltage.
    static final int
    ADC_CHANNEL_TEMPERATURE
    ADC channel: internal temperature.
    static final double
    ADC_TEMPERATURE_DIVISOR
    Divisor for converting raw ADC temperature reading to degrees Celsius.
    static final double
    ADC_TEMPERATURE_OFFSET
    Offset subtracted after dividing to yield temperature in degrees Celsius.
    static final double
    ADC_VOLTAGE_DIVISOR
    Divisor for the battery voltage formula.
    static final double
    ADC_VOLTAGE_MULTIPLIER
    Multiplier for converting a raw ADC battery reading to volts.
    static final int
    CHANNEL_A
    Channel A (port index 0x00).
    static final int
    CHANNEL_B
    Channel B (port index 0x02).
    static final int
    CHANNEL_C
    Channel C (port index 0x01).
    static final int
    CHANNEL_D
    Channel D (port index 0x03).
    static final int
    CMD_BRAKE
    Command ID: Brake one or more channels.
    static final int
    CMD_DRIVE
    Command ID: Drive one or more channels.
    static final int
    CMD_GET_WATCHDOG
    Command ID: Get watchdog timeout.
    static final int
    CMD_QUERY_ADC
    Command ID: Query ADC channel.
    static final int
    CMD_SET_WATCHDOG
    Command ID: Set watchdog timeout.
    static final int
    DIRECTION_CLOCKWISE
    Direction: clockwise.
    static final int
    DIRECTION_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE
    Direction: counter-clockwise.
    static final int
    MANUFACTURER_ID
    BLE manufacturer company ID for Vengit Limited (little-endian: 0x0198).
    static final String
    OTA_CONTROL_UUID
    UUID of the OTA Control characteristic (write 0x03 to reboot into DFU).
    static final String
    OTA_DATA_UUID
    UUID of the OTA Data characteristic (write 20- or 55-byte chunks).
    static final String
    OTA_SERVICE_UUID
    UUID of the OTA Firmware Update GATT service.
    static final int
    QUICK_DRIVE_BRAKE_CCW
    Quick Drive magnitude: brake (for direction 1).
    static final int
    QUICK_DRIVE_BRAKE_CW
    Quick Drive magnitude: brake (for direction 0).
    static final int
    QUICK_DRIVE_DIRECTION_MASK
    Bit mask for extracting the direction (bit 0) from a Quick Drive byte.
    static final int
    QUICK_DRIVE_FULL_SPEED
    Quick Drive magnitude: full speed.
    static final int
    QUICK_DRIVE_MAGNITUDE_MASK
    Bit mask for extracting the magnitude (bits 7–1) from a Quick Drive byte.
    static final int
    QUICK_DRIVE_ZERO_SPEED
    Quick Drive magnitude: zero speed.
    static final String
    REMOTE_CONTROL_COMMANDS_UUID
    UUID of the Remote Control Commands characteristic.
    static final String
    REMOTE_CONTROL_SERVICE_UUID
    UUID of the SBrick Remote Control GATT service.
    static final int
    RESPONSE_AUTH_ERROR
    Response code: Authentication error.
    static final int
    RESPONSE_AUTH_NEEDED
    Response code: Authentication needed.
    static final int
    RESPONSE_INVALID_DATA_LENGTH
    Response code: Invalid data length.
    static final int
    RESPONSE_INVALID_PARAMETER
    Response code: Invalid parameter.
    static final int
    RESPONSE_NO_SUCH_COMMAND
    Response code: No such command.
    static final int
    RESPONSE_SUCCESS
    Response code: Success.
    static final int
    RESPONSE_THERMAL_PROTECTION
    Response code: Thermal protection active.
    static final int
    RESPONSE_WRONG_STATE
    Response code: Wrong state.

    • OTA_SERVICE_UUID

      public static final String OTA_SERVICE_UUID
      UUID of the OTA Firmware Update GATT service.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • REMOTE_CONTROL_COMMANDS_UUID

      public static final String REMOTE_CONTROL_COMMANDS_UUID
      UUID of the Remote Control Commands characteristic.

      All commands are written to this characteristic. Write Without Response.

      Important: the official PDF lists this UUID without the leading zero. The correct full UUID (with leading zero) is used here.

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • OTA_CONTROL_UUID

      public static final String OTA_CONTROL_UUID
      UUID of the OTA Control characteristic (write 0x03 to reboot into DFU).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • OTA_DATA_UUID

      public static final String OTA_DATA_UUID
      UUID of the OTA Data characteristic (write 20- or 55-byte chunks).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CHANNEL_A

      public static final int CHANNEL_A
      Channel A (port index 0x00).
      See Also:

      public static final int CHANNEL_C
      Channel C (port index 0x01).

      public static final int CHANNEL_B
      Channel B (port index 0x02).
      See Also:

      public static final int CHANNEL_D
      Channel D (port index 0x03).
      See Also:

    • DIRECTION_CLOCKWISE

      public static final int DIRECTION_CLOCKWISE
      Direction: clockwise.
      See Also:

    • DIRECTION_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE

      public static final int DIRECTION_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE
      Direction: counter-clockwise.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_BRAKE

      public static final int CMD_BRAKE
      Command ID: Brake one or more channels. Format: [0x00][ch1][ch2]...
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_DRIVE

      public static final int CMD_DRIVE
      Command ID: Drive one or more channels. Format: [0x01][channel][direction][power] repeated per channel. Power range: 0x00 (freewheel) – 0xFF (full).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_QUERY_ADC

      public static final int CMD_QUERY_ADC
      Command ID: Query ADC channel. Format: [0x0F][channel: 0x00–0x09]. Returns 2 bytes little-endian: bits 15–4 = 12-bit ADC, bits 3–0 = channel.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_SET_WATCHDOG

      public static final int CMD_SET_WATCHDOG
      Command ID: Set watchdog timeout. Format: [0x0D][timeout] where timeout is in units of 0.1 s. 0x00 disables the watchdog. Default: 0x05 (0.5 s).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CMD_GET_WATCHDOG

      public static final int CMD_GET_WATCHDOG
      Command ID: Get watchdog timeout. Format: [0x0E]. Returns 1 byte.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ADC_CHANNEL_BATTERY

      public static final int ADC_CHANNEL_BATTERY
      ADC channel: battery voltage.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ADC_CHANNEL_TEMPERATURE

      public static final int ADC_CHANNEL_TEMPERATURE
      ADC channel: internal temperature.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ADC_VOLTAGE_MULTIPLIER

      public static final double ADC_VOLTAGE_MULTIPLIER
      Multiplier for converting a raw ADC battery reading to volts.

      Formula: V = (adc * ADC_VOLTAGE_MULTIPLIER) / ADC_VOLTAGE_DIVISOR

      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ADC_VOLTAGE_DIVISOR

      public static final double ADC_VOLTAGE_DIVISOR
      Divisor for the battery voltage formula.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ADC_TEMPERATURE_DIVISOR

      public static final double ADC_TEMPERATURE_DIVISOR
      Divisor for converting raw ADC temperature reading to degrees Celsius.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ADC_TEMPERATURE_OFFSET

      public static final double ADC_TEMPERATURE_OFFSET
      Offset subtracted after dividing to yield temperature in degrees Celsius.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

      Response code: Success.

    • QUICK_DRIVE_BRAKE_CW

      public static final int QUICK_DRIVE_BRAKE_CW
      Quick Drive magnitude: brake (for direction 0). In the Quick Drive notification, 0x00 means brake.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • QUICK_DRIVE_BRAKE_CCW

      public static final int QUICK_DRIVE_BRAKE_CCW
      Quick Drive magnitude: brake (for direction 1). In the Quick Drive notification, 0x01 means brake.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • QUICK_DRIVE_ZERO_SPEED

      public static final int QUICK_DRIVE_ZERO_SPEED
      Quick Drive magnitude: zero speed.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • QUICK_DRIVE_FULL_SPEED

      public static final int QUICK_DRIVE_FULL_SPEED
      Quick Drive magnitude: full speed.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • QUICK_DRIVE_MAGNITUDE_MASK

      public static final int QUICK_DRIVE_MAGNITUDE_MASK
      Bit mask for extracting the magnitude (bits 7–1) from a Quick Drive byte.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • QUICK_DRIVE_DIRECTION_MASK

      public static final int QUICK_DRIVE_DIRECTION_MASK
      Bit mask for extracting the direction (bit 0) from a Quick Drive byte. 0 = clockwise, 1 = counter-clockwise.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values
